query: Generate a Kubernetes configmap.yaml for environment configuration
example:
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ConfigMap
metadata:
  name: app-config
  labels:
    app.kubernetes.io/name: app
    app.kubernetes.io/instance: app-production
    app.kubernetes.io/component: config
    app.kubernetes.io/part-of: platform
    app.kubernetes.io/managed-by: the-code-factory
data:
  ENVIRONMENT: "production"
  LOG_LEVEL: "info"
  PORT: "8000"
  WORKERS: "4"
  TIMEOUT: "30"
  CORS_ORIGINS: "https://app.example.com"
  METRICS_ENABLED: "true"
